title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.860 - Compensation fixed by county commission (third and fourth class counties)
text:
205.860.  Compensation fixed by county commission (third and fourth class counties). — The county commission shall fix the salary of the county superintendent of public welfare and of his assistants in its county.
(RSMo 1939 § 9720) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14183
